cards.back: The initial state of a React component is the initial values of its state. It's set when the component is first rendered.
Async state initialization in React involves fetching data from an API or other external source and updating the component's state accordingly.
Updating state in React involves using the `setState()` method to change the component's state. It can be done directly or by lifting the state up to a parent component.
Lifting state up in React involves moving a component's state to a parent component, making it easier to share state between components and reduce unnecessary re-renders.
Stateless components in React are components that don't have their own state and instead rely on props to determine their behavior.
